0.00/MN COMM 2/1/00 BY W/A; MATTER CONTD TO 3/14/00 @ 8:30AM IN ROOM #416 TO REVIEW FTHR'S EMPLOYMENT STATUS; MTHR'S APPEARANCE IS WAIVED AT NEXT
ON RE: ACTUAL CUSTODY OF MORE PERMANENT BASIS FOR TWO CHILDREN OF ACTION; COURT TO SUGGEST TO MR. ZIMMELMAN TO FIRST MEET W/BOTH PARENTS TOGETHER TO
F CHILDREN SHOULD REMAIN TOGETHER AND IF SO, WITH WHICH PARENT; IF CHILDREN ARE TO BE SEPARATED, THEN WHICH PARENT TO GET WHICH CHILD; COURT TO
DONE; FTHR TO FRONT ENTIRE $2,000.00 RETAINER FEE; MTHR TO PAY HALF OF FEE BY REIMBURSING FTHR @ $100.00/MN; IF MTHR DOES NOT PAY, THEN COURT WILL
BY PARTIES; WITHIN 10 DAYS OF OBTAINING REPORT; PARTIES TO CONTACT FCS MEDIATOR=A. DE LOACHE FOR MEDIATION; IF UNABLE TO RESOLVE ISSUES, THEN CONTACT
EN AT EMERYVILLE'S POLICE STATION ON FRIDAY @ 6:30 PM FOR PICK-UPS AND SUNDAY @ 6:30 PM FOR DROP-OFFS; IF MTHR OR FTHR IS NOT THERE BY 6:45 PM, THEN
E TO DO SO; MTHR'S ATTY TO PREPARE ORDER AFTER HEARING. (SLABACH) PROCEEDINGS REPORTED BY RICHARD BOTTO #5680
